meaning: adj.咬的,嚼的,[动物] 啮齿目的,侵蚀性的n.啮齿动物
examples: Researchers observed one bird impale a rodent on a cactus.
When there is a full moon, this nocturnal rodent is careful to stay in its burrow.
Mickey Mouse starts as an ugly, little rodent.
The company released an image of an apparent rodent carcass inside the switchboard unit.
Nonetheless, some regulatory bodies have voted in precautionary bans based entirely on rodent studies.
